core.label: Core Agent
core.description: Porrima app, managed llama.cpp services, local storage, memory, and chat.

tts.label: Voice Pack
tts.description: Python TTS backends and audio tooling. Can be added after core setup.

images.label: Image Pack
images.description: Optional image-generation backend such as ComfyUI or stable-diffusion.cpp.

automations.label: Automation Pack
automations.description: Scheduled routines, notifications, and background autonomy defaults.
